vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Enclosure for driver boards
Conduit for high voltage wiring
Conduit for low voltage signal wiring

Removable cover for service access

Keying feature for connector mating

Grounding scheme clearly defined
PCB mounting with standoff and clearance
Adjacent interfaces for mounting and service paths

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC milling for aluminum parts, LPBF for complex geometries
manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary datum on the mounting flange, secondary on the articulation flange

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Use CMM for final inspection of critical dimensions

generated_parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
generated_parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

requirements: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075
Vehicle context: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach
Discipline: Structures - Role: Rigid links with load path from tool flange to base, ribs where needed
Evidence features: link_body, rib, base_flange
Part consolidation: Parts are integrated only when service access, inspection, and interface clarity remain visible
Fastener joint sanity: Explicitly represented fastener patterns, pin joints, slots, bosses, and mating clearances
Inspection readability: Reviewer can see what to inspect and why without opening raw JSON
Fastener locking and preload evidence: Critical joints state locking method and torque/preload intent
Thread and insert engagement sanity: Threaded connections into printed or soft material use inserts or bosses with adequate engagement depth
Axis datum readability: J1-J6 axis rings, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, and tool flange datum are visible
Cable spine serviceability: Cable spine clips externally or remains inspectable through open channels
Joint cartridge replaceability: Joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links
Bearing shaft mounting sanity: Each joint shows a bearing seat with shoulder or retaining feature, shaft locating geometry, and stated fit intent for inner/outer races
Moving joint harness workmanship: Harness crossing each joint has slack loop, strain relief at both ends, and routing that avoids pinch points through the full motion range

verify.rule: All required fields are present.
Mass estimate within acceptable range.
All physical features are represented in geometry_ops.
Interfaces match neighboring subsystem requirements.
Some fastener joints lack explicit locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential stress concentration at rib attachment.
risk.mit: Add fillets and chamfers to smooth transitions.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for motor connector.
risk.mit: Increase access window size or reposition motor mount.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to tight routing.
risk.mit: Implement slack loops and strain relief at joints.

risk.desc: Unclear serviceability for internal components.
risk.mit: Enhance access windows and labeling for easier maintenance.

risk.desc: Possible interference between adjacent parts.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance dimensions between interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal dissipation issues due to limited airflow around the thermal inspection window.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the thermal inspection window and ensure adequate spacing between it and surrounding components.

risk.desc: Risk of improper grounding if the star grounding point is not properly connected to the chassis.
risk.mit: Ensure that the grounding point is clearly marked and connected to the chassis using a dedicated ground wire.

risk.desc: Possible misalignment during assembly if the mounting flange is not accurately aligned with the arm structure.
risk.mit: Include alignment pins or guides to ensure precise mating of the mounting flange with the arm structure.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference if the power and signal channels are not adequately shielded.
risk.mit: Implement shielding between the power and signal channels to minimize electromagnetic interference.

risk.desc: Potential damage to connectors if the connector keying feature is not correctly aligned.
risk.mit: Add alignment marks or guides to ensure correct mating of the connector keying feature.
